prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise corridor at night during a storm. Theo Harbor in elegant evening wear and Jun Lumen in a weatherproof jacket work together to push a heavy, industrial watertight door shut. Rain streaks against the glass, reflections on the polished floor, dramatic lighting, intense cooperative body action, no text, no watermark.

Same luxury cruise corridor, continuous camera shot. Theo Harbor and Jun Lumen finish latching the heavy door, locking it securely against the storm. They step back, exhaling in relief, the room bathed in warm, flickering emergency lighting. The storm continues to rage outside the door, cinematic anime realism, no text, no watermark.
